Interface Debuggable

All Known Subinterfaces:
Conditional<T>, DefaultExpression<T>, Expression<T>, KeyedIterableExpression<T>, KeyProviderExpression<T>, KeyReceiverExpression<T>, Literal<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractArrowSlot, AnyInfo, AsyncEffect, AudienceClassInfo, BlockClassInfo, ClassInfo, Condition, ContainerExpression, ConvergingEffect, ConvertedExpression, ConvertedKeyProviderExpression, ConvertedLiteral, CursorSlot, Delay, DirectionalEffect, DisplayEntitySlot, DroppedItemSlot, Effect, EffectSection, EffectSectionEffect, EntityClassInfo, EnumClassInfo, EquipmentSlot, EventValueExpression, ExpressionList, ExpressionSection, FunctionReference, FunctionReferenceParser.EmptyExpression, IndeterminateDelay, InventoryClassInfo, InventorySlot, ItemFrameSlot, ItemStackClassInfo, ItemTypeClassInfo, LiteralList, LiteralString, LocationClassInfo, LoopSection, NameableClassInfo, OfflinePlayerClassInfo, ParticleEffect, PlayerClassInfo, PropertyBaseCondition, PropertyBaseExpression, PropertyCondition, PropertyExpression, QuaternionClassInfo, QueueClassInfo, RegistryClassInfo, ReturnableTrigger, ScalableEffect, ScriptClassInfo, Section, SectionExpression, SectionSkriptEvent, SelfRegisteringSkriptEvent, SimpleEvent, SimpleExpression, SimpleLiteral, SimplePropertyExpression, SimplifiedCondition, SimplifiedLiteral, SkriptEvent, Slot, SlotClassInfo, SlotWithIndex, Statement, Structure, TextComponentClassInfo, ThrowableProjectileSlot, Trigger, TriggerItem, TriggerSection, UnparsedLiteral, Variable, VariableString, VectorClassInfo, WrapperExpression
public interface Debuggable
Represents an element that can print details involving an event.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    toString()
    Should return toString(null, false)
    String
    toString(@Nullable Event event, boolean debug)
     

  • Method Details

    • toString

      String toString(@Nullable @Nullable Event event, boolean debug)
      Parameters:
      event - The event to get information from. This is always null if debug == false.
      debug - If true this should print more information, if false this should print what is shown to the end user
      Returns:
      String representation of this object
